basics.name: Yilda Boukhtouchen
basics.label: Ph.D. candidate.
basics.summary: Hello! My name is Yilda (she/her) and I am a graduate student in the Queen’s University High Energy and Astroparticle Theory group (Q-HEAT). My research interests centre around dark matter phenomenology. I am also passionate about science outreach and communication.
